zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Walwyn於1364年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾姆 馬可爾時，他的父親Richard Walwyn27歲，母親Joan De Helyon21歲。他去世於1415年5月20日在他的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾姆 馬可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Walwyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Wal(d)wine, which is of ancient Germanic origin, from elements meaning ‘power’ + ‘friend’.

from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Walweyn, Walwain. The central French form of this name is Gawain (see Gavin ). This name is found in the medieval Arthurian romances and is traditionally explained as an adaptation of the Welsh name Gwalchmei, perhaps meaning ‘hawk of the plain’.

variants.name: Gavin
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gábháin or Ó Gáibhín, both of which are derived from diminutives of gábhadh ‘want’ or ‘danger’ (the second being the more likely meaning here).

Scottish and northern English: from the personal name Gavin, Scottish form of English Gawain and French Gauvain . The name was introduced into English from French versions of the Arthurian romances, where this name was borne by one of the knights of the Round Table, brother of Galahad and Mordred and a nephew of Arthur. It has been taken to be an adaptation of the Welsh name Gwalchmei, perhaps ‘hawk of the plain’.
Scottish: shortened form of McGavin , which is believed to be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gobhann ‘son of the smith’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Walwyn was born in 1364, in Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Walwyn, was 27 and his mother, Joan De Helyon, was 21. He died on 20 May 1415, in his hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Walwyn est né en 1364, à Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Walwyn, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan De Helyon, avait 21 ans. Il est décédé le 20 mai 1415, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Walwyn(이)가 1364년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 무치 마클에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Walwyn(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan De Helyon(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1415년 5월 20일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 무치 마클에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Walwyn родился в 1364 г. в местности муч маркл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Walwyn было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan De Helyon, 21. Он умер 20 мая 1415 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности муч маркл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
